data.title: Nobel announces non-brokered private placement offering for distribution in Canada, not authorized in the US.
data.description: This press release is intended for distribution exclusively in Canada and is not permitted for distribution to United States news wire services or for dissemination within the United States.

data.title: Grayscale initiates trusts connected to potential BNB and HYPE ETFs, precursor to possible ETF filings.
data.description: Grayscale has filed Delaware trusts associated with possible BNB and HYPE ETPs, a common precursor to ETF submissions.

data.title: Ocugen CEO to present at J.P. Morgan 2026 Healthcare Conference on Jan 15th, discussing gene therapy progress.
data.description: Ocugen, Inc., a biotechnology company specializing in gene therapies for blindness diseases, will present at the 44th Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference. Dr. Shankar Musunuri, Chairman and CEO of Ocugen, will lead the presentation, discussing the company's modifier gene therapy platform and clinical development progress. Ocugen aims to file three Biologics License Applications (BLAs) over the next two years, including the rolling BLA of OCU400 for retinitis pigmentosa in 2026. The presentation will take place on January 15, 2026, at The Westin St. Francis in San Francisco. A live webcast will be available on the Ocugen investor site. The company's gene therapies target inherited retinal diseases and blindness conditions like Stargardt disease and age-related macular degeneration. For more information, visit www.ocugen.com.

data.title: H&R Block offers free tax pro review for new clients with purchase of DIY products, enhancing digital experience.
data.description: Enhancing consumers' digital-first experience by integrating H&R Block's tax professional knowledge. This initiative aims to leverage the expertise of H&R Block's tax professionals to provide a seamless digital experience for customers. This move is expected to significantly improve user interaction and satisfaction rates by bringing together the convenience of digital platforms with the proficiency of tax professionals. This step underscores the company's commitment to innovation and customer-centricity.

data.title: Aircraft Avionics MRO market to reach $10.3 Bn by 2035, growing at 3.8% CAGR from $7.1 Bn in 2024. Source: ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: A recent report on the Aircraft Avionics MRO Market reveals that it was valued at US$7.1 billion in 2024, with a projected growth to US$10.3 billion by 2035, indicating a CAGR of 3.8% over the forecast period. The aviation industry is driving this growth with various factors influencing the market dynamics.

data.title: Upbound Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPBD) to participate in 2026 ICR Conference with CEO and CFO presenting in Orlando.
data.description: In Plano, Texas, Upbound Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPBD) disclosed its participation at the 2026 ICR Conference in Orlando, Florida. The company, a frontrunner in technology-driven financial solutions for underserved consumers, will have its CEO Fahmi Karam and CFO Hal Khouri partake in a Fireside Chat on January 13 at 3:30 PM ET. The event will feature a live webcast for accessibility.

data.title: Molson Coors sets 2025 earnings date, to attend 2026 CAGNY Conference in New York. News from Golden, Colorado & Montreal.
data.description: In Golden, Colorado and Montreal, Molson Coors Beverage Company has revealed that it will be announcing its fourth-quarter and full-year earnings for 2025 on a specific date. Additionally, the company will be participating in the 2026 CAGNY Conference. This news signifies a significant event for the company, indicating important financial figures and possible strategic insights that will be shared during the conference.

data.title: Nu Skin Enterprises' CEO to discuss company strategy & future plans at ICR Conference. Launching Prysm iO in 2026, targeting emerging markets like India. Webcast on Jan 12 at 1:30 p.m. ET.
data.description: In Provo, Utah, Nu Skin Enterprises Inc. revealed that CEO Ryan Napierski will engage in a moderated fireside chat to elaborate on company strategy and business status on January 12. The session will delve into the firm’s upcoming launch of Prysm iO intelligent wellness device in 2026 and prospects in emerging markets like India. Interested individuals can watch the webcast live from 1:30 p.m. ET.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin stagnate before labor data; Bitcoin at $90K with $222.72M liquidations. ETFs see $398.95M outflows.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin remains stable around $90,000, with the overall sentiment in the cryptocurrency market staying neutral. Liquidations totaling $222.72 million were observed in the last 24 hours. Bitcoin ETFs experienced $398.95 million in net outflows, while Ethereum ETFs recorded $159.2 million in net outflows. Current cryptocurrency prices are as follows: Bitcoin at $90,407.00, Ethereum at $3,094.62, Solana at $138.71, and XRP at $2.09. Trader Jelle noted that Bitcoin's support and resistance levels are the same. Access the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Colorado Springs School Fair on Jan. 24 to showcase different schools for local families. Event starts at 11:00 am.
data.description: Families in Colorado Springs, Colorado, will have the opportunity to explore various educational options for their children at the upcoming Colorado Springs School Fair on January 24th. The event will commence at 11:00 am at the Colorado Springs Event Center. This fair aims to provide parents with information regarding different schools in the region, all conveniently located under one roof. This event will be crucial for parents seeking the best educational opportunities for their children.

data.title: Albuquerque School Fair on Jan. 24 will showcase various education options for parents at UNM Student Union Building, starting at 11AM.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, in Albuquerque, New Mexico, parents can explore a variety of schools for their children on Saturday, January 24, all under one roof. The Albuquerque School Fair will kick off at 11:00 AM at the Student Union Building at the University of New Mexico.

data.title: 800 attendees expected at Atlanta Education Expo at Loudermilk Center in two weeks. Free event for parents to explore schools in the region.
data.description: Loudermilk Center in Atlanta will host a celebration of education and opportunity, with 800 attendees expected. Parents seeking new schools for their children can participate in a free event to explore various schools in the region. The event will take place on Jan. 9, 2026.

data.title: Bullish (NYSE: BLSH) releases December 2025 metrics including trading volume, spreads, and volatility for Bitcoin and Ethereum.
data.description: In December 2025, Bullish (NYSE: BLSH), a worldwide digital asset platform catering to institutions, disclosed its monthly statistics on January 9, 2026. The report encompassed crucial data like trading volume, average trading spread, and volatility indicators for Bitcoin and Ethereum. For further details and definitions concerning these metrics, interested parties can access the monthly metrics packages provided for investors.

data.title: Lindsay Corp declares $0.37/share quarterly dividend, payable Feb 27, 2026 to shareholders (10.5M shares outstanding).
data.description: In Omaha, Nebraska, Lindsay Corporation, a prominent manufacturer and distributor of irrigation and infrastructure equipment, disclosed that its Board of Directors has authorized a standard quarterly cash dividend of $0.37 per share. This dividend will be paid on February 27, 2026, to shareholders on record by February 13, 2026. As of January 5, 2026, Lindsay Corporation had about 10.5 million shares in circulation, traded on the NYSE under the symbol LNN.

data.title: Ashton Woods USA L.L.C. to hold conference call on Jan 15, 2026 at 11:00 AM EST to discuss Quarterly Report.
data.description: Ashton Woods USA L.L.C. in Alpharetta, GA revealed today that their Quarterly Report for the fiscal quarter concluding on November 30, 2025, is anticipated to be available on the Company's official website by Thursday, January 15, 2026. A conference call will be conducted on the same day at 11:00 AM EST to delve into the Quarterly Report and the operational outcomes of the Company for the aforementioned quarter.
